prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a934301b`.
codex_response:
Implemented `a934301b` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: treat each 4-connected nonzero object as one unit and erase it iff it contains more than one `8`; objects with `0` or `1` cyan cells are kept unchanged. I used the Opus hint because it matched the official pairs, and I rejected the Sonnet hint in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a934301b/notes.md) because the training examples do not support any positional rule for the `8`s. The generator stays on-family by sampling separated solid blue rectangles on official-style grid sizes and recoloring `0..4` cells per rectangle to `8`. No new shared primitive was needed.

Files: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a934301b/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a934301b/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a934301b/generator.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a934301b/notes.md)

Artifacts: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a934301b/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a934301b/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a934301b/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a934301b/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a934301b/previews/preview_03.png)
